articles.title_en: Four-time Olympic medalist Evgeni Plushenko once slammed athletes who ‘turn their back’ on Russia. Now his teenage son will skate for Azerbaijan.
articles.lead_en: Thirteen-year-old figure skater Alexander Plushenko is changing his sporting citizenship and will now compete for Azerbaijan.
